headline: PNC FirstBank Integration And Total Rewards Push Toward National Scale
summary: PNC Financial Services Group (NYSE:PNC) is advancing its transformation into a national bank through the integration of its FirstBank acquisition. The company is preparing a large-scale conversion of FirstBank systems as part of this integration. PNC is expanding branch presence in selected growth markets alongside the integration effort. The bank is rolling out its Total Rewards loyalty program nationwide to reach customers across the US. PNC Financial Services Group sits among the larger...
